title: Create: Schematiclear
description: Just a simple datapack that adds a recipe to turn schematics into empty schematics without having to use the schematicannon
body: A very simple datapack that adds a recipe to turn schematics into empty schematics without having to use the schematicannon. It's a simple qol feature that I think should be in base Create. If you need to manually install, just download the file and plop it into your datapacks folder! :3
